phase_1_foundations.conflict_check: none — all zero-dependency, no shared files between DOCKER/LIB/VERIFY/FIXT/SCR/DOCS/BATS
phase_1_foundations.shared_files_warning: DOCKER-001 and DOCKER-003 touch same files but are in different phases

phase_2_healthcheck_and_registry.conflict_check: none — Dockerfile edits vs fixtures.json, no file conflict

phase_3_test_infra_and_compose.conflict_check: none — test-framework.sh, helpers.bash, provision.sh, FIXTURES.md, docker-compose.yml: all distinct

phase_4_ci_and_smoke.conflict_check: none — ci-entrypoint.sh, test_signature.bats, CI.md: all distinct

recommended_execution.explanation: All tasks are file manipulation in a single repo. Any agent with code_generation capability works. Run phases sequentially, tasks within phases in parallel via subagents.
recommended_execution.critical_path: DOCKER-001 → DOCKER-003 → ORCH-001 → SCR-003 → TEST-001 (shortest: 5 steps)
